title: Ready ● Set ● Knit: Scarf | Shawl
hero: Plan once. Knit with confidence. A single pattern for scarves and shawls—designed for real machines and real yarn.
description:
Ready ● Set ● Knit: Scarf | Shawl helps you plan and knit a successful rectangular scarf or shawl on your knitting machine—without guesswork.
You choose your machine, yarn, stitch direction, and finished width. The pattern handles the math, checks for compatibility, and gives you stitch counts and length guidance that fit your setup.

One pattern. Multiple sizes. Clear decisions—so you can knit with confidence.
excerpt: A flexible machine-knit scarf and shawl planner that adapts to your machine, yarn, size and skill level - so the math is handled before you knit.
whyUseThisTool:
Because scarves and shawls look simple—but the sizing, stitch counts, and yarn choices still matter.
This tool helps you make those decisions before you cast on, so your project fits your machine and turns out the way you expect.
metaTitle: RSK: Scarf | Shawl – Machine Knitting Pattern & Planner
metaDescription: Plan a machine-knit scarf or shawl with confidence. RSK calculates stitch counts, checks compatibility, and adapts to your machine, yarn, and size choices.
